author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ NEW DISCORD SCAM , SCAM AWARENESS Our team has become aware of yet another new discord scam. This post is simply to let our community know. @everyone How It Works Random users will reply to you with a "Show More" at the bottom of their msg. , Clicking this links you to another discord (DISCORD WARNS YOU AT THIS POINT) , The scammers will, "assist" you in the new discord server you have joined. , The Star Atlas discord and z.INK discord will most likely not encounter this issue as we have proper security measures in place already. AS ALWAYS, STAY SAFE, DO NOT TAKE EXTERNAL LINKS FROM UNTRUSTED SOURCES All support for Star Atlas and Zink will be handled through our official channels. Always ask a Mod or Team member if you have questions.
